blocks.text: Carlsen's World Championship quest begins tomorrow

Tuesday is silent on the schedule — but the storm arrives Wednesday. Magnus opens his FIDE Candidates bid, and Barcelona's 4-point lead over Real Madrid gets its biggest test Saturday at the Metropolitano.
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates Tournament, Round 1 — World Championship challenger on the line

blocks.label: Also this week
items: 🚴 Wed 11:55 — Dwars door Vlaanderen, Wærenskjold the lone Norwegian
🎾 Sun 06:00 — Monte-Carlo Masters opens, clay season begins
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest, rain enters the server
